summary: Frontend testing completed for multiple updates. 7/8 features verified. Key findings: (1) 'Built on Trust' correctly replaced '30-Day Guarantee', (2) Rahul's quote is pillar-focused (Care), (3) 14 Pillars has animated flowing energy lines and floating orbs, (4) Connection message appears, (5) All videos have audio tracks. ISSUE: Testimonial videos are NOT 8 seconds as claimed - actual durations are 4.7s, 5.0s, 6.4s (UI shows '0:08' but files are shorter).

issues: Video duration mismatch: UI shows '0:08' but actual video files are 4.7s, 5.0s, 6.4s - voiceover may cut off before video ends
